name: Lyman Orchards Golf Club
about: Lyman Orchards Golf Club is a year-round golf destination featuring multiple courses, a golf center with simulators, and instruction programs. The venue operates on a dynamic pricing model where rates are constantly adjusted based on demand, availability, and weather. It caters to a wide range of golfers from beginners to advanced players, offering championship courses designed by Robert Trent Jones and a dedicated 9-hole course. The facility includes a pro shop, club fittings, dining options, and hosts leagues, outings, and events.
why_golfers_like_it: Multiple championship courses designed by Robert Trent Jones
Comprehensive instruction programs for all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: On-site dining available at 1741 Pub & Grill and Apple Barrel
Alcohol service available at 1741 Pub & Grill

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs or rent clubs from the pro shop. Club fittings are also available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink policies are not specified, but on-site dining options are available at 1741 Pub & Grill and Apple Barrel.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18-hole playtime varies depending on the course and time of day. The Player Course can be played from 4,667 to 6,600 yards.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Lyman Orchards offers junior golf programs, junior golf camps, and family-friendly amenities.
